name: Harpy TF / Transformation - The Birdbrain Curse
description: (CW: Transformation, mental changes, bird brain) Cursed by your boss, you've been transformed into a cute harpy! And not just any harpy- not a very bright one! It's so hard to focus, and you can never seem to shake this dumb sense of happiness that keeps taking you over... You can't help it- you're just such a birdbrain!
creator: Orbital_Lithium
